allow: PowerShell($rustc = Get-Command rustc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($rustc\) { rustc --version; cargo --version } else { "RUST_MISSING" }; "---cargo home---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.cargo\\bin\\cargo.exe"\) { "cargo.exe exists at .cargo\\bin" } else { "no cargo in .cargo\\bin" })
